query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS remaining_inversions
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'MLB'
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND ROUND(ABS(CAST(awayModelSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2)) - CAST(awayBookSpread AS DECIMAL(6,2))), 2) > 2.9;

  AND awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL
